subject: A grand white-marble Greek temple with tall fluted columns sits atop a stepped hilltop, approached by a long ascending stone stairway flanked by dark cypress trees
description: A monumental classical temple crowns a sun-warmed hilltop, its white-marble colonnade and pediment rendered in clean Mediterranean light. A broad stone stairway carved into the slope leads up to the temple's threshold, framed on either side by tall, dark cypress trees and clusters of olive-green shrubs. Pale stone retaining walls terrace the hill, and the surrounding landscape rolls out under a soft hazy sky. There are no figures present — the scene is purely architectural and devotional, evoking a hilltop sanctuary in an idealized ancient Greek world.
foreground: stone stairway ascending the hill, flanked by cypress trees and low shrubs, with terraced retaining walls in pale stone
background: white-marble Greek temple with columns and pediment crowning the hilltop, hazy sky behind
